steps.title: Track the concession
steps.content: The previous sentence admits that Beaumont's painting cannot technically show a fourth dimension because humans see in three. The next sentence pivots to the value of the painting's multiple perspectives.

steps.title: Rule out wrong transitions
steps.content: A would introduce an example, B would restate the limitation, and C would simply add another point. The transition needs to mean "despite that limitation." The answer is D.
